statement: PFDoDA's residual closes by enhancing the long-chain active carrier capacity (Vmax), which overcomes the GHK anion-exclusion ceiling.

confidence.basis: qualitative judge: Decisive: the active carrier (Vmax) overcomes the anion-exclusion ceiling the GHK route cannot. At ~5x base Vmax (20->100) the 2-pool reaches PFDoDA root 62 vs 69 and grain 46 vs 45.5 (straw 102 vs 50, ~2x over) -- so the longest-chain residual is an active-carrier-capacity limit, closable. SCOPE: in-sample, straw ~2x over, and the ~5x enhancement is a long-chain-specific lever (not yet QSPR-derived).
